Knowledge Base + Calculators

Insurance decisions, explained before you buy.

Insurance calculators and plain-English guides for U.S. households. Built for long-tail questions that big comparison sites often skip.

Calculators Blog State Guides

Calculators

Start with a worksheet

Use this educational worksheet to estimate a planning range, then verify details with official sources or a licensed professional.

Life insurance needs calculator

Estimate a coverage range using DIME and income replacement logic.

Use calculator

Final expense planning calculator

Estimate funeral, travel, debt, and immediate cash needs.

Use calculator

ACA subsidy planning estimator

Estimate FPL percentage and a rough premium tax credit planning range.

Use calculator

Home and renters coverage gap calculator

Estimate personal property, additional living expense, liability, and flood gaps.

Use calculator

Research

High-intent guides from real questions

Articles are grouped by user pain points and backed by official sources such as NAIC, CMS, Medicare, FEMA, FTC, IRS, and SBA.

Insurance Terms and Policy Basics

Plain-language definitions for premiums, deductibles, limits, exclusions, riders, claims, and beneficiaries.

Read guide

Homeowners, Renters, and Flood Insurance

Dwelling coverage, personal property, liability, additional living expenses, flood exclusions, FEMA flood risk, and escrow basics.

Read guide

Life Insurance Needs and Policy Types

Life insurance need estimates, term/whole/universal differences, beneficiaries, death benefits, and policy locator workflows.

Read guide

State Insurance Rules, Complaints, Licensing, and Rate Checks

State-by-state insurance education for complaints, licensing lookup, company status, auto and property rule verification, rate filing questions, residual markets, and disaster resources.

Read guide

State Guides

Verify the local rule before acting

Insurance complaints, licensing checks, residual markets, disclosures, and rate filings are state-sensitive. Start with the state source guide, then return to the calculator or article.

California

Official source guide for California insurance complaints, licensing checks, consumer alerts, and state-sensitive coverage questions.

Read guide

Texas

Official source guide for Texas insurance complaints, licensing checks, consumer alerts, and state-sensitive coverage questions.

Read guide

Florida

Official source guide for Florida insurance complaints, licensing checks, consumer alerts, and state-sensitive coverage questions.

Read guide

New York

Official source guide for New York insurance complaints, licensing checks, consumer alerts, and state-sensitive coverage questions.

Read guide
